# truenas_iscsi_target (Resource)

Manages a TrueNAS iSCSI target.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "truenas_iscsi_target" "example" {
  name = "data-target"
  groups = [{
    portal = truenas_iscsi_portal.example.id
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The base name of the target (appended to the global basename).

### Optional

- `alias` (String) An optional alias for the target.
- `groups` (Attributes List) Portal-initiator group associations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `mode` (String) Target mode: ISCSI, FC, or BOTH.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the target.

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Required:

- `portal` (Number) Portal ID for this group.

Optional:

- `auth` (Number) Auth group tag (references iscsi_auth tag).
- `authmethod` (String) Authentication method: NONE, CHAP, or CHAP_MUTUAL.
- `initiator` (Number) Initiator group ID. Omit to allow all initiators.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import truenas_iscsi_target.example 1
```
